13F-HR/A 1 a69133e13f-hra.txt AMENDMENT NO.3 TO FORM 13F QUARTER ENDED 3/31/2000 1 THIS FILING LISTS SECURITIES HOLDINGS REPORTED ON THE FORM 13F FILED ON MAY 15, 2000 PURSUANT TO A REQUEST FOR CONFIDENTIAL TREATMENT AND FOR WHICH CONFIDENTIAL TREATMENT WAS DENIED ON JANUARY 31, 2001. UNITED STATES SECURITIES AND EXCHANGE COMMISSION Washington, D.C. 20549 Form 13F Form 13F COVER PAGE Report for the Calendar Year or Quarter Ended: March 31, 2000 Check here if Amendment [X]; Amendment Number: 3 This Amendment (Check only one.): [ ] is a restatement. [X] adds new holdings entries. Person Signing this Report on Behalf of Reporting Manager: Name: Marc D.
